name: io.github.zapfetch/mcp-server
description: APAC-native web scraping for AI agents — scrape / search / crawl / map / extract, with first-class Japanese / Korean / Chinese / Southeast-Asian site coverage.

environmentVariables.name: ZAPFETCH_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ZapFetch API key (get one at https://console.zapfetch.com)

environmentVariables.name: ZAPFETCH_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the upstream API URL (defaults to https://api.zapfetch.com). For development / self-host.

packageArguments.name: --port
packageArguments.description: HTTP port to expose from the container
